name: send-slack-message
description: Send messages to Slack channels using the Slack Web API. Supports plain text and Block Kit JSON payloads.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Secret path for the Slack bot OAuth token (e.g. 'slack/bot_token')

CHANNEL.description: Slack channel ID or name to send the message to (e.g. '#general' or 'C01234ABCDE')

BLOCKS.description: JSON string of Slack Block Kit blocks for rich formatting (overrides TEXT when set)

setup_instructions.title: Create a Slack App
setup_instructions.detail: Go to https://api.slack.com/apps and click 'Create New App'. Choose 'From scratch', give it a name, and select your workspace.

setup_instructions.title: Enable chat:write permission
setup_instructions.detail: In your app settings, navigate to 'OAuth & Permissions'. Under 'Bot Token Scopes', add the 'chat:write' scope.

setup_instructions.title: Install app to workspace
setup_instructions.detail: Still in 'OAuth & Permissions', click 'Install to Workspace'. Authorize the app. Copy the 'Bot User OAuth Token' (starts with xoxb-).

setup_instructions.title: Store token as secret
setup_instructions.detail: Use set_secret to store the Bot User OAuth Token: key_path='slack/bot_token', value='xoxb-your-token-here'.

setup_instructions.title: Invite bot to channel
setup_instructions.detail: In Slack, type /invite @YourAppName in the target channel to allow the bot to post there.
